sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Magic Spirit Summoning
special_mechanics.description: Player can summon four magic spirits (Dytto - water, Efreet - fire, Shade - shadow, Bow - plant) found in shrines to aid in combat and traversal

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Default unlimited knife weapon with special attacks; equippable limited-use weapons (swords, crossbows, bombs) that break after set uses; some weapons can ignite targets

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Sources provide gameplay description and reception analysis but no precise physics parameters, movement speeds, or sub-pixel data. Game documented as having 'unique mechanics' and '3D feel' graphics but specific movement values not disclosed in available documentation.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Beyond Oasis (gameplay and reception sections)
